member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Lead.Orchestrator.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddLeadOrchestrator(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers per-lead orchestrator compute services: and . The Channel-based LeadOrchestrator BackgroundService and LeadOrchestratorChannel were removed in Phase 4; Azure Durable Functions now orchestrate lead processing via LeadOrchestratorFunction.
